stemHtml: A zone of strong convection currents is encountered during a flight. In spite of moderate turbulence you decide to continue the flight. What are your precautionary measures?

options.a: Decrease the speed / try to descend below the zone of convective currents.
options.b: Increase the speed / try to descend below the zone of convective currents.
options.c: Decrease the speed / try to climb above the zone of convective currents if aircraft performance parameters allow.
options.d: Increase the speed / try to climb above the zone of convective currents if aircraft performance parameters allow.
